name: Project Energy Reimagined Acquisition Corp. Warrant
summary: Project Energy Reimagined Acquisition Corp. Warrant entitles the holder to purchase one share of Class A ordinary share at an exercise price of $11.50. Project Energy Reimagined Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC).
